title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull & push models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node & browsers (via proxy).

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style); supports multi-model chats, uploads, RAG.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, generate, embeddings, tools.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM integration for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by community; use Ollama models as generators in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension backed by Ollama.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat and generate code with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU or CPU mode.

title: ollama-models
summary: Unofficial curated list of custom Ollama Modelfiles (CodeLlama, SQLCoder, etc.).

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Streamlit GUI to chat with any Ollama model; runs locally in browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface for chat, generate, pull, embed.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing typed async client for Ollama with tokio & streaming support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot integration for Ollama; replies in threads, respects rate limits.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot wrapper for Ollama; private & group chats, session isolation.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit for PDF Q&A.
